title: Evaluate full git history and extend recent-30 analysis
instructions: First audit the existing analyze-recent-30-commits outputs and record what can be reused.
Reuse existing checkpoints when coverage and quality are sufficient; do not rewrite them without a reason.
For uncovered commits, create one checkpoint per commit with subject, core changes, touched modules, risk points, and likely error causes.
The final summary must explain the full architecture evolution, major refactor chains, likely bug-introducing commit clusters, and recommended investigation ranges.
Run python .harness/scripts/verify_task.py --task-id analyze-all-commits after every completed step.
